title: Petit Eva whats your favourite
wikitext:
[]: Petit Eva -what's your favourite?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Wed Oct 17, 2012 4:59 pm Mine is the Shinji-asleep-in-class Evangelion@school #4

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Wed Oct 17, 2012 9:21 pm I think the episode with Suzuhara on the train.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Oct 17, 2012 9:24 pm My favorite is probably the episode that shows the classroom-cleaning episode from Gendo's point of view, when he's trying to muster up the courage to give Rei the bouquet of flowers.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Oct 18, 2012 10:19 am 1. the Unit-1 vs Sachiel fight 2. The Riding bikes one with the EoE call back shot of Asuka. 3. the 'Rei II takes Rei I's place at school' one

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 18, 2012 3:09 pm Ghost!Kaworu helping out chibi!Rei against the greediness of capitalism: He always makes the difference.

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Fri Oct 19, 2012 1:48 am Definitely a tie between the bike episode with the great callback humour and Gendo's 'eternal struggle' in wooing Rei. But I had no idea what the hell I was watching when I first stumbled across this series.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 19, 2012 8:59 am The episode with the chalk is always very well received whenever I show it at a panel. I also really like the booger episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Oct 19, 2012 12:15 pm Indeed, Unit 1 vs Zeruel becomes an invaluable lesson in the correct method of depositing your nasal waste.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Mon Jan 27, 2014 7:25 am Funniest: Misato throwing chalk at a sleeping Shinji The kids playing baseball whenever Gendo closes the door. Saddest: The spinning plates episode that ends with Shinji eating dinner with Yui. So tragic seeing Yui. Cutest/Favorite Pretty much any episode with tiny Rei I. I love when she cleans the Angel with the booger. Crying when she wants a cake. Looking up at the new Rei from 'Happy Days' other reality at the breakfast table. But my #1 favorite is the rainy day with all 3 Reis. Rei I sitting in the park looking at a puddle. The other Rei buying them dinner.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Feb 06, 2014 12:54 pm Ooh, we have a thread for this! My favorite episode would have to be the one where Sachiel comes in, cutely rampages, and then gets its butt kicked. (Although the chalk episode is right up there, too.)

[]:             Quote Post by Gorbatschow » Thu Feb 06, 2014 12:58 pm Chalk, definitely the chalk-episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Feb 06, 2014 12:59 pm Just the sheer ridiculousness is part of what makes Puchi Eva great, but that chalk episode is something else entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by one-eyed » Tue Feb 11, 2014 8:52 am The episode where Gendo and Kensuke are beaten by Misato because they were spying and filming Rei and Asuka. Followed closely by episode of chalk attack. But worth honorable mention the episode of the Instrumentality with homage to Ultraman, Shinji in the desert and the transformation of golem to Rei III as the most bizarre.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoCrush » Tue Feb 11, 2014 9:21 am one-eyed wrote: But worth honorable mention the episode of the Instrumentality with homage to Ultraman , Shinji in the desert and the transformation of golem to Rei III as the most bizarre.

[]:             Quote Post by one-eyed » Tue Feb 11, 2014 10:03 am MisatoCrush: It's the episode where a pink ball absorbs all the characters and Kensuke's camera still working on that limbo. It is practically the opening of Ultraman, an old tokusatsu series, but with the Eva characters. If you want to see the opening look for: ULTRAMAN - OPENING ORIGINAL - COMPLETE on Youtube, but I notice that the video has nearly 30 seconds of presentation of the creators of the video. They are annoying but bearable. P.S.: My father is quite fan of this series and, supposedly, Hideaki Anno is also a fan of Ultraman and he used some of the symbols of the last movie of Ultraman in Eva 2.0 and in the Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 11, 2014 3:34 pm one-eyed wrote: supposedly, Hideaki Anno is also a fan of Ultraman

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Feb 11, 2014 8:09 pm Hm... I haven't seen a lot of Petit Eva. I didn't really like what I saw, it's not my type of humor I guess. If there's something Eva related which really made me laugh it's After the End.

[]:             Quote Post by one-eyed » Wed Feb 12, 2014 4:37 am Mr. Tines wrote: Not only is there that well known clip of him standing at the top of a playground slide doing the Ultraman arm movements, a little research will find you pictures of young Anno cosplaying Ultraman, and the action figure thereof.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 12, 2014 9:49 am one-eyed wrote: So the legends were true!

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Feb 12, 2014 8:44 pm Special mention here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VOszSZdz17U#t=80 - what happens there is the greatest piece of self-referencing in anything ever. I defy any Eva fan not to either crease up laughing or go 'WAT.' at that.
summary:
[]: Petit Eva -what's your favourite?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Wed Oct 17, 2012 4:59 pm Mine is the Shinji-asleep-in-class Evangelion@school #4

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Wed Oct 17, 2012 9:21 pm I think the episode with Suzuhara on the train.
